title: Validate experiment cohort targeting based on initial consumption
description: Tests the rule that the Trial Corner is only assigned to users who do not start consumption within the first 5 minutes of their trial.
preconditions: Two new user accounts are created and have just activated a ₹1 trial.

steps.description: 1. For User A, do not play any content within the first 5 minutes after activating the trial.
2. For User B, start playing a video within 2 minutes of activating the trial.
3. After 6 minutes, have both users navigate to the homepage.
4. Verify that User A sees the 'Trial Corner' widget.
5. Verify that User B sees the standard trial experience (or a different experiment) and NOT the 'Trial Corner' widget.

expected_result: The Trial Corner feature is correctly assigned only to the user who met the non-consumption criteria, confirming the cohort targeting logic works.
